findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "search_jobs" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Search open company job listings. Map the user's natural language to filters. Always set search_mode on search_jobs and get_job_details: keyword_search when the…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "search_jobs" is 2739 chars, far longer than this server's median (157). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.
